headline: Bezos Backs AI Startup to Discover New Materials for Chipmaking
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Producing the world’s most in-demand semiconductors requires enormous amounts of energy and access to rare minerals. CuspAI, a two-year-old British startup, has raised nearly half a billion dollars on its bet that artificial intelligence can improve that process. headline: BrightEdge Research: Google AI Cites Facebook in 19.5 Million Answers as Social Platforms Become AI Discovery Sources
